subject: docs(claude): sync shared conventions from glow-props CLAUDE.md
body:
Fetched external CLAUDE.md from devmade-ai/glow-props and merged
convention changes into graphiki's CLAUDE.md. Prevents drift between
sibling projects sharing the same standards.

Changes synced:
- Added "Fetching This File" section with hosted URL
- Added "READ AND FOLLOW" reminder header
- Updated Cleanup: `// KEEP:` marker convention (was vague "marked for preservation")
- Updated Quality Checks: added specificity (XSS, re-renders, boundary validation)
- Added AI Notes section (file reading, build tools, sibling repo access, TutorialModal)
- Added Triggers section (review, audit, docs, mobile, clean, perf, security, debug, improve)
- Added Suggested Implementations section (PWA system, debug system, app icons, PDF download)
- Added 3 new Prohibitions (no feature removal during cleanup, no assumption-based commits, no interactive input prompts)

Tags: documentation, conventions, cross-reference, glow-props
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: convention-sync
Semver: patch
title: sync shared conventions from glow-props CLAUDE.md
